allow: PowerShell(node --version; \(Get-Command pnpm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; \(Get-Command npm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; \(Get-Command corepack -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source)

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-Process BdCabs.Api -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; if \(Get-Process BdCabs.Api -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) { 'still running' } else { 'stopped' }")
Bash(curl -s -i -X OPTIONS http://localhost:5175/api/v1/auth/login -H 'Origin: http://localhost:3000' -H 'Access-Control-Request-Method: POST' -H 'Access-Control-Request-Headers: content-type')
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 5175,3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalPort | Format-Table -HideTableHeaders")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=963852 psql -h localhost -U postgres -d bd-cabs-db -t -c "SELECT \\"Email\\", \\"Role\\", \\"Status\\", \\"CreatedAt\\" FROM \\"Users\\" WHERE \\"Email\\" = 'support@bdcabs.com';")

Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "customer1@bdcabs.com / Customer123!  → HTTP %{http_code}\\n" -X POST http://localhost:5175/api/v1/auth/login -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"emailOrPhone":"customer1@bdcabs.com","password":"Customer123!"}')

Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "rahim.test@example.com / Secret123!  → HTTP %{http_code}\\n" -X POST http://localhost:5175/api/v1/auth/login -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"emailOrPhone":"rahim.test@example.com","password":"Secret123!"}')

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "Stop-Process -Id 26420 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; if \(Get-Process -Id 26420 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) { 'still running' } else { 'stopped' }")

PowerShell($b = Test-NetConnection -ComputerName localhost -Port 5175 -WarningAction SilentlyContinue; $f = Test-NetConnection -ComputerName localhost -Port 3000 -WarningAction SilentlyContinue; "Backend 5175: $\($b.TcpTestSucceeded\)"; "Frontend 3000: $\($f.TcpTestSucceeded\)")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=963852 psql -h localhost -U postgres -d bd-cabs-db -tAc "SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='DriverProfiles' AND column_name='AvailabilityMode';")

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-Process -Name 'BdCabs.Api' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id,StartTime | Format-Table -Auto; Get-Process -Name 'dotnet' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id,StartTime | Format-Table -Auto")

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-Process -Name 'BdCabs.Api' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id,StartTime; if \(-not \(Get-Process -Name 'BdCabs.Api' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\)\) { 'not running' }")

PowerShell($exe = "C:\\my_project\\BD_Cabs\\backend\\bin\\Debug\\net8.0\\BdCabs.Api.exe"; $p = Start-Process -FilePath $exe -WorkingDirectory "C:\\my_project\\BD_Cabs\\backend" -PassThru; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; if \(Get-Process -Id $p.Id -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) { "API started, PID $\($p.Id\)" } else { "API exited early" })

PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -OwningProcess 3052 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty LocalPort -Unique; if \($conns\) { "Listening on: $\($conns -join ', '\)" } else { "No listening ports yet" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000/swagger/index.html" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "swagger HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { try { $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "root HTTP $\($r2.StatusCode\)" } catch { "probe: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell($ports = 5173,5174,3000,4173; foreach \($p in $ports\) { $c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $p -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $proc = \(Get-Process -Id $c[0].OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).ProcessName; "Port $p LISTENING \(proc: $proc\)" } }; "done")

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $pid0 = $c[0].OwningProcess; $name = \(Get-Process -Id $pid0\).ProcessName; "Port 5000 LISTENING \(PID $pid0, $name\)" } else { "NOT listening on 5000" })

PowerShell($p5175 = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5175 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $p5000 = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "5175 listening: $\([bool]$p5175\)"; "5000 listening \(should be false\): $\([bool]$p5000\)"; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:5175/api/v1/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "health HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "health probe: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__ \) $\($_.Exception.Message.Split\([Environment]::NewLine\)[0]\)" })

PowerShell($p = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5176 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty OwningProcess; if \($p\) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force; "killed PID $p on :5176" } else { "nothing listening on :5176" })

PowerShell($p = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5175 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty OwningProcess; if \($p\) { $name=\(Get-Process -Id $p\).ProcessName; Stop-Process -Id $p -Force; "killed PID $p \($name\) on :5175" } else { "nothing listening on :5175" })

PowerShell($ok=$false; for \($i=0; $i -lt 20; $i++\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5175/swagger/index.html" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 2; if \($r.StatusCode -eq 200\) { $ok=$true; break } } catch { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800 } }; if \($ok\) { Write-Output "API UP \(swagger 200\)" } else { Write-Output "swagger not reachable, checking root..."; try { \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5175/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 2\).StatusCode } catch { $_.Exception.Message } })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\my_project\\BD_Cabs\\backend" -Filter "appsettings*.json" | Select-Object Name; Write-Output "--- csproj UserSecretsId ---"; Select-String -Path "C:\\my_project\\BD_Cabs\\backend\\BdCabs.Api.csproj" -Pattern "UserSecretsId"; Write-Output "--- env ---"; if \($env:ConnectionStrings__DefaultConnection\) { "ENV SET" } else { "ENV NOT SET" })

PowerShell($up=$false; for \($i=0; $i -lt 25; $i++\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5175/swagger/index.html" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 2; if \($r.StatusCode -eq 200\) { $up=$true; break } } catch { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800 } }; if \($up\) { "API UP" } else { "NOT UP YET" })

PowerShell($psql = \(Get-Command psql -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; if \($psql\) { Write-Output "psql: $psql" } else { Write-Output "psql NOT on PATH"; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name })

PowerShell($env:PGPASSWORD="963852"; & "C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL\\18\\bin\\psql.exe" -h localhost -p 5432 -U postgres -d bd-cabs-db -t -A -F"|" -c "SELECT u.""Email"", u.""Status"", count\(ra.""Id""\) FROM ""Users"" u JOIN ""RentalAgreements"" ra ON ra.""DriverId"" = u.""Id"" GROUP BY u.""Email"", u.""Status"";")

PowerShell($up=$false; for \($i=0; $i -lt 25; $i++\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 2; if \($r.StatusCode -eq 200\) { $up=$true; break } } catch { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800 } }; if \($up\) { "FRONTEND UP at http://localhost:3000" } else { "not up yet" })

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== port 3000 ==="; \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { Get-Process -Id $_ }\) | Select-Object Id, ProcessName; Write-Output "=== port 3001 ==="; \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { Get-Process -Id $_ }\) | Select-Object Id, ProcessName; Write-Output "=== 3000 content check ==="; try { \(Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:3000/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3\).Content.Substring\(0,200\) } catch { $_.Exception.Message })

PowerShell($up=$false; for \($i=0; $i -lt 25; $i++\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5175/swagger/index.html" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 2; if \($r.StatusCode -eq 200\) { $up=$true; break } } catch { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800 } }; if \($up\) { "API UP" } else { "NOT UP" })

PowerShell($up=$false; for \($i=0; $i -lt 30; $i++\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5175/swagger/index.html" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 2; if \($r.StatusCode -eq 200\) { $up=$true; break } } catch { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800 } }; if \($up\) { "API UP" } else { "NOT UP" })
PowerShell($p = Get-Process -Id 21188 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p\) { "PID 21188 = $\($p.ProcessName\) | $\($p.Path\)" } else { "21188 not found" })

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { Stop-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess -Force; "stopped vite on 3001" } else { "nothing on 3001" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5175/swagger/index.html" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3; "swagger: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "swagger ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; try { $t = \(Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5175/api/v1/auth/login" -Method Post -ContentType "application/json" -Body \(@{emailOrPhone="driver1@bdcabs.com";password="Driver123!"} | ConvertTo-Json\)\).tokens.accessToken; if \($t\) { "login OK \(API fully serving\)" } } catch { "login ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; Write-Output "=== port ==="; \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5175 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess)

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5175 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { Stop-Process -Id \($c.OwningProcess | Select-Object -First 1\) -Force; "stopped old backend" } else { "nothing on 5175" })
